source: Te Whatu Ora Capitation Rates s.13 — Contingent Capitation Rates
notes: Per-patient capitation. Te Whatu Ora pays this to the PHO at the published rate per enrolled patient (age × gender).

ProCare's documentation describes this as 'performance-linked contingent capitation' — what reaches the practice may be reduced by PHO retention against performance metrics. Engine computes the gross TWO→PHO figure; gap to practice receipts is the PHO's retention slice.
Reconciles to within 0.5% at Hillside (≈100% pass-through) and ~15% high at Blockhouse Bay (PHO retains ~15%, consistent with per-GP variation in March 2026 CBF report).
